description: Represents an application graph link for an application graph node generated from the different logs collected by the app agents.

connections.description: The connection link data from this node to other nodes in the application graph.
connections.title: connections

dns.description: The DNS link data from this node to other nodes in the application graph.
dns.title: dns

logs.description: The log links from this node to other nodes in the application graph.
logs.title: logs

nodeID.description: The unique identifier of the application graph node.
nodeID.title: nodeID

title: AppGraphLink
